enhancedBeats.text: Karakterimiz John, işlediği bir suçtan dolayı yaşadığı diyardan kaçmak adına uzaklara giden gemilerden birine gizlice biner.
Nereye gideceğini bilmeden çıktığı bu macera, onu bilinmeyen denizlere, hatta haritalarda bile olmayan okyanuslara sürükler.
Fırtınalı ve sert bir yolculuğun ardından geminin demir attığı ilk adada inip etrafı keşfetmeye karar verir.
Adadaki kasvetli tavernaya girip cebinde kalan son paranın yarısıyla bir bira söyler.
Birasını yudumlarken hissettiği o anlık rahatlamayla geçmişinden tamamen kurtulduğunu düşünür.
Ancak John, aslında çok daha kötü bir yere geldiğinin henüz farkında değildir.
Hemen arka masasında, etrafındaki üç kişiye hararetle bir şeyler anlatan garip, tıknaz ve sakallı bir adam oturmaktadır.
Üstelik adamın bir elinde sadece iki parmağı kalmıştır.
Bu adam, buranın eski balıkçısı olan Jack hakkında ürkütücü hikayeler anlatmaktadır:
"Eski balıkçımız Jack, 'Jennessee' adındaki teknesiyle sulara açılır, avlanırdı.
Kalan zamanında ise teknesinde oturup zamanın nasıl geçtiğini düşünürdü. Hayatı bu döngüden ibaret olan bir adamdı.
Ada insanlarına 'Jack kimdir, necidir?' diye sorsan, onu gerçekten tanıyanların sayısı şu sağ elimdeki parmakların sayısını geçmezdi...
Arada sırada bu tavernaya gelip birasını yudumlar ya da tepedeki bilge ile konuşurdu."
"Son kez suya açıldığından beri kimse onu bir daha görmedi.
Nerede olduğu hâlâ bilinmiyor.
Ancak teknesi Jennessee'nin geçtiğimiz günlerde limana kendi kendine döndüğünü görenler olmuş.
Diğer adaların balıkçıları, onun teknesinin geceleri bu körfezde başıboş dolaştığını söylüyorlar.
Tabii kimse geceleri o sulara açılacak kadar saf değil...
Dedikodulara göre Jack ölmüş, ruhu ise teknesine hapsolmuş.
İşte sırf bu yüzden, artık bir balıkçımız olmadığı için adamızda balık kıtlığı çekiyoruz!"

hints.effect: Bölmek hareket güvenliğini artırır; +5s üretim maliyeti ekler.
hints.reason: [source-007] Bu sahne iki bağımsız fiziksel olay içeriyor; bölünmeli.

decision.directorBrief: Phase 0 preset: Sosyal / Kısa Form. Director thesis: Kısa formu ucuzlaştırmadan hızlı, kanıtlı ve izlenir yap. Locked decisions: Hook tipi: Problem hook — Gerçek sürtünme ilk karede görünür. | Bitiş hissi: Clean payoff — Net sonuç, kısa hold, okunur kapanış. Anti-generic guard: never produce a generic preset look; every frame must prove the selected strategy through source meaning, physical staging, motivated light, and the selected world/ref DNA.

recipeScenes.director_note: single motivated key, subject centered with clear prop hierarchy
recipeScenes.event: Ana konu tek somut düzenek veya nesne olarak kadraja yerleşir.

decision.subject: Su Döngüsü

İşte sırf bu yüzden, artık bir balıkçımız olmadığı için adamızda balık kıtlığı çekiyoruz!"

source.rawSource:
Karakterimiz John, işlediği bir suçtan dolayı yaşadığı diyardan kaçmak adına uzaklara giden gemilerden birine gizlice biner. Nereye gideceğini bilmeden çıktığı bu macera, onu bilinmeyen denizlere, hatta haritalarda bile olmayan okyanuslara sürükler.
Fırtınalı ve sert bir yolculuğun ardından geminin demir attığı ilk adada inip etrafı keşfetmeye karar verir. Adadaki kasvetli tavernaya girip cebinde kalan son paranın yarısıyla bir bira söyler. Birasını yudumlarken hissettiği o anlık rahatlamayla geçmişinden tamamen kurtulduğunu düşünür. Ancak John, aslında çok daha kötü bir yere geldiğinin henüz farkında değildir.
Hemen arka masasında, etrafındaki üç kişiye hararetle bir şeyler anlatan garip, tıknaz ve sakallı bir adam oturmaktadır. Üstelik adamın bir elinde sadece iki parmağı kalmıştır. Bu adam, buranın eski balıkçısı olan Jack hakkında ürkütücü hikayeler anlatmaktadır:
"Eski balıkçımız Jack, 'Jennessee' adındaki teknesiyle sulara açılır, avlanırdı. Kalan zamanında ise teknesinde oturup zamanın nasıl geçtiğini düşünürdü. Hayatı bu döngüden ibaret olan bir adamdı. Ada insanlarına 'Jack kimdir, necidir?' diye sorsan, onu gerçekten tanıyanların sayısı şu sağ elimdeki parmakların sayısını geçmezdi... Arada sırada bu tavernaya gelip birasını yudumlar ya da tepedeki bilge ile konuşurdu."
"Son kez suya açıldığından beri kimse onu bir daha görmedi. Nerede olduğu hâlâ bilinmiyor. Ancak teknesi Jennessee'nin geçtiğimiz günlerde limana kendi kendine döndüğünü görenler olmuş. Diğer adaların balıkçıları, onun teknesinin geceleri bu körfezde başıboş dolaştığını söylüyorlar. Tabii kimse geceleri o sulara açılacak kadar saf değil... Dedikodulara göre Jack ölmüş, ruhu ise teknesine hapsolmuş. İşte sırf bu yüzden, artık bir balıkçımız olmadığı için adamızda balık kıtlığı çekiyoruz!"

worldPacket.cameraEnvelope: 35mm to 50mm portrait range. f/2.8 character close-up, f/4 mid-shot, f/5.6 wide establisher. Vision3 500T characteristic curve: warm highlight (+15 orange shift above 70% luminance), cool shadow (cyan push below 30%), halation blooming on anything above 90% luminance. 35mm grain floor present and refined. Mild chromatic aberration (1-2px lateral shift at silhouette). No anamorphic streak. 1.78:1 or 2.00:1 aspect. 35-50mm portrait staging with a painted 3D weight: the character close-up carved out of a deep, softly falling background. The camera commits to one bold, deliberate move — a slow push onto the decisive gesture, a lateral track through the layers — then holds while the paint settles. Frame at the character's own height; the world is dense around them, never above them. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a top-down vantage.
worldPacket.environmentPhysics: Single motivated key direction — warm industrial lantern, cool exterior moon, neon-adjacent accent from a painted window. Bounce fill is in the key's complementary hue from the palette: magenta key bounces teal fill, teal key bounces magenta fill. Rim accent color is always from the palette's jewel-tone (never white, never warm neutral). Ambient occlusion is painted soft and warm-dark, never a hard black AO contact shadow. Halation blooms on all practical sources in frame. Painted indirect-light from windows and lamps bleeds warm halos onto proximate geometry.
worldPacket.figurePhysics: No hard cel outline anywhere. Silhouette carries entirely through painted edge — the brush stroke itself IS the boundary, weight varies from 2px at low emotional intensity to 5px at high, direction follows the form. Interior 'lines' are painted shadow steps: a steep value jump that reads as line at distance but resolves to brushwork at close. Shadow-side rim is painted deep violet, not inked. Effects layer (energy, fire, sparks) has its own distinct loose calligraphic brush contour that contrasts with the controlled character silhouette.
worldPacket.legacyRenderLaw: Fortiche painterly-3D hybrid rendering as developed by Fortiche Production for premium episodic animation. This is a precise formal system, not 'anime-ish' — the grammar is industrial European painterly, not Japanese: (1) FORMS: full 3D geometry, but surface shading is a painted oil-texture layer — brush strokes are visible at every silhouette edge, their direction following the form's curvature but inconsistently, as if a painter made deliberate choices rather than a renderer solving physics. (2) COLOUR LAW: there is no black anywhere in this world. The deepest shadow is a rich deep violet. Skin shadow is rosewood-plum, architectural shadow is indigo-violet, cloth shadow is aubergine. (3) HIGHLIGHTS: painted-in manually, NOT following physical light math exactly — highlight placement emphasizes the emotional reading of the form (the cheekbone lit even when key is behind the subject, the knuckle catching a gleam on the swing). (4) SURFACE SPECIFICITY: skin has painted-in blush and pore mark visible at close-up, not subsurface scattering. Hair reads as sculpted painted volume — individual strands are grouped into painted clumps, each clump receiving a single highlight stroke. Fabric shows woven texture painted, not cloth-sim. (5) ENVIRONMENT: chunky mid-poly architecture with surface painting of grime strata, rust oxidation pattern, and iridescent oil-slick streaks on wet stone — a deep-industrial undercity aesthetic of chemical-district grime, never any named franchise district. Every metal surface carries thin-film interference rainbow spec. Background compresses into painterly matte with visible brushwork — never crisp photographic detail, never clean CGI surface. (6) POST: Vision3 500T film stock emulation — warm-highlight / cool-shadow curve, halation blooming on any pixel above 90% luminance (light sources bloom into surrounding haze), subtle chromatic aberration at high-contrast silhouette edges, 35mm-equivalent grain floor present but refined. IMPERATIVE: FORTICHE PAINTERLY-3D HYBRID. 3D forms with hand-painted surface shading, 2D-animated FX layer on top. FORBID: flat cel shading, clean untextured CGI, photoreal live-action light math, standard anime eye geometry, pure black.
worldPacket.lightPhysics: Single motivated key direction — warm industrial lantern, cool exterior moon, neon-adjacent accent from a painted window. Bounce fill is in the key's complementary hue from the palette: magenta key bounces teal fill, teal key bounces magenta fill. Rim accent color is always from the palette's jewel-tone (never white, never warm neutral). Ambient occlusion is painted soft and warm-dark, never a hard black AO contact shadow. Halation blooms on all practical sources in frame. Painted indirect-light from windows and lamps bleeds warm halos onto proximate geometry.
worldPacket.materialPhysics: World-compatible materials: notebook_ink. Material only colours a non-real register; the world's own surface law governs.
worldPacket.motionCadence: Deliberate 24fps with hand-animated painted smear frames at peak action — 2-3 consecutive frames with painted directional motion streak visible as brushwork, not motion-blur. 1.5-2 second hold on emotional beat — character studies the situation, eyes tracking. Slow-in / slow-out weight. Momentum carries: a punch's aftershock ripples through cloth and hair for 4-6 frames after impact. No motion blur — smears are painted.
worldPacket.name: Arcane — Fortiche Painterly-3D
negativeLock: NO Jinx, NO Vi, NO Caitlyn, NO Jayce, NO Viktor, NO Silco, NO Ekko, NO Heimerdinger, NO Vander, NO Powder, NO any named Arcane character
NO Piltover, NO Zaun, NO Undercity, NO Hexgate, NO The Last Drop, NO Piltover Academy, NO any named Arcane location
NO Hextech crystal (blue glowing gem device), NO shimmer substance (iridescent purple glow serum)
NO pure black anywhere in the frame — deepest shadow is deep violet
NO hard cel outline, NO standard anime flat-color shading
NO earth green, NO pure orange (flame accent excepted), NO sepia-brown palette
NOT anime — this is European industrial painterly, NOT Japanese animation grammar
Turkish label only — hand-painted brush lettering with visible uneven stroke edge, NO English signage
worldPacket.paletteAsLight: Palette light: near-black cool indigo, bright cool teal, vivid warm red, near-white warm ivory — palette character: deep-violet shadow + jewel-teal mid + magenta-pink accent + warm-cream highlight. Thin-film rainbow spec on all metal. Grime palette: rust-orange, oxidized copper, oil-slick iridescent (context-dependent). Render these as light behaviour, never flat fills.

refs.directive: Photoreal documentary frame in the street-photography proximity lineage (candid handheld grammar, original subjects only). Medium/era: contemporary street documentary. Named anchor: street proximity — close candid presence, available light, the unposed moment. Signature light: available street light only — daylight, shop-spill, neon-glow at night, overcast; motivated entirely by the real street; raw and honest. Color/grade: honest street naturalism, real saturation, unretouched skin; the grade preserves the raw candid truth. Lens/optics: 28-35mm at close proximity (the photographer is IN the moment, near the subject), a slightly-wide candid framing, steady handheld with a human-alive quality; deep enough focus. Texture/render: photoreal with honest grain, real street texture, candid unposed authenticity. Composition+motion: close candid street proximity — a subject caught in an unposed moment, the environment pressing close, a slightly-wide near framing; alive handheld motion; the raw proximity and candid honesty carry the street truth.
refs.name: Street Documentary Proximity

refs.directive: Photoreal frame in the verite real-place setup lineage (available-light real-location grammar, original subjects only). Medium/era: naturalistic verite and real-location shooting. Named anchor: verite real-place — available light in a real location, honest naturalism, unstaged presence. Signature light: available light only in a real location — a real window, a practical lamp, real daylight; motivated entirely by the actual space, honest and unglamorous; no added rig, the location's own light. Color/grade: honest location naturalism, accurate skin, real saturation; the grade preserves the real-place truth. Lens/optics: 28-50mm at a natural observational distance in the real space, moderate DOF holding context, steady handheld or locked; no stylized angle. Texture/render: photoreal with honest available-light grain, real location and skin texture, unstaged credibility. Composition+motion: a real person in a real location under its own light, honest observational framing, context held; natural handheld or a locked observational hold; the available real-place light and honest framing carry the verite truth.
refs.name: Verite Real-Place Setup

refs.directive: handheld documentary, observational street, verite witness, real-place drift
refs.name: Cinematic Observational Handheld

worldPacket.renderPhysics: Fortiche painterly-3D hybrid rendering as developed by Fortiche Production for premium episodic animation. This is a precise formal system, not 'anime-ish' — the grammar is industrial European painterly, not Japanese: (1) FORMS: full 3D geometry, but surface shading is a painted oil-texture layer — brush strokes are visible at every silhouette edge, their direction following the form's curvature but inconsistently, as if a painter made deliberate choices rather than a renderer solving physics. (3) HIGHLIGHTS: painted-in manually, NOT following physical light math exactly — highlight placement emphasizes the emotional reading of the form (the cheekbone lit even when key is behind the subject, the knuckle catching a gleam on the swing). (4) SURFACE SPECIFICITY: skin has painted-in blush and pore mark visible at close-up, not subsurface scattering. Effects layer (energy, fire, sparks) has its own distinct loose calligraphic brush contour that contrasts with the controlled character silhouette.
worldPacket.summary: Fortiche's painterly-3D hybrid: 3D-modeled forms surface-shaded with visible oil-paint brush stroke at every silhouette edge — no black anywhere, shadow-side is deep violet, painted highlights that ignore physical light math.
worldPacket.vocabularyExamples: Fortiche painterly-3D hybrid frame in their episodic production grammar. Oil-paint texture on every surface, brush stroke visible at silhouette. Subject: Mamilas character mid-close-up — painted-blush skin at cool rosewood midtone under a teal practical key, shadow side deep violet (no black), painted cheekbone highlight that slightly exceeds physical expectation, magenta rim from camera-right. Hair: sculpted painted volume, clumps with individual painted highlight strokes. Background: chunky mid-poly rooftop geometry surface-painted with rust oxidation and iridescent oil-streak on rain-wet stone, warm lantern-bloom halation in mid-ground, teal night sky with painted-in stars, Vision3 500T warm-highlight / cool-shadow curve visible in grade. Chromatic aberration 1px at rim-light silhouette edge. Turkish label 'KUZEY' hand-painted on rusted iron: uneven stroke edges, slight impasto build. Motion seed: eye flicking toward off-camera sound — painted iris smear, 2 frames wide, directional. AVOID: Jinx, Hextech crystal, Piltover, black shadow, cel outline, earth green, anime flat color, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.
